title: Topheth #8612
definition:
Tophet or Topheth = "place of fire"

 1) a place in the southeast end of the valley of the son of Hinnom
    south of Jerusalem. Same as \\08613\\
nasbUsage:
Definition: Tophet or Topheth = "place of fire"

 1) a place in the southeast end of the valley of the son of Hinnom
    south of Jerusalem. Same as \\08613\\

    NASB:  a place S. of Jer.
